chapter_title.en: The Chapter on the Virtues of Prayer

parts.text: 627 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنَّ اَلْعَبْدَ إِذَا صَلَّى اَلصَّلاَةَ فِي

text: وَقْتِهَا وَ حَافَظَ عَلَيْهَا اِرْتَفَعَتْ بَيْضَاءَ نَقِيَّةً، تَقُولُ حَفِظْتَنِي حَفِظَكَ اَللَّهُ وَ إِذَا لَمْ يُصَلِّهَا لِوَقْتِهَا وَ لَمْ يُحَافِظْ عَلَيْهَا اِرْتَفَعَتْ سَوْدَاءَ مُظْلِمَةً تَقُولُ ضَيَّعْتَنِي ضَيَّعَكَ اَللَّهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.627 - Imam (as) said:
"When a servant performs prayer at its prescribed time and maintains it, it ascends as a pure, white light, saying, 'You preserved me, may Allah (swt) preserve you.'
But if he does not perform it at its prescribed time and does not maintain it, it ascends as a dark, black shadow, saying, 'You neglected me, may Allah (swt) neglect you.'"
